data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Additional layer of security for user accounts.
data.technical_spec: OTP via SMS or authenticator apps.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.technical_spec: Periodic penetration testing and code reviews.

data.title: Data Encryption at Rest and in Transit
data.description: Protection of user data both at rest and during transmission.

data.title: Automatic Updates
data.description: Automatic security updates to patch vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Seamless user-side updates without manual intervention.

data.title: Account Security Alerts
data.technical_spec: Tracking of login locations and new device sign-ins.
